title: justicia clinopodium
intro: Justicia clinopodium, also known as Mexican hyssop or bee balm, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Justicia clinopodium include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Justicia clinopodium can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
